title: Mom’s Meat Sauce & Meat Balls
content:
Mom’s Meat Sauce & Meat Balls

Sauce
Ingredients
6 cans tuttorusso crushed tomatoes
4-5 cloves crushed garlic
Extra virgin olive oil
5 fresh basil leaves
Parsley
Black ground pepper
Garlic powder
1 piece of pork for sauce
1 piece of beef for sauce
1 pork braciole
1 pack of sweet or hot sausage
You can use pork Ribs if you like too

In a sauce pan sauté garlic in EVO until almost golden
Add meat - stirring meat till all sides are browned. (Stirring almost constantly)
Add cans of sauce
Keep on med flame until boil
Lower flame and add seasoning.

Do not use a tin stock pot!!!! Meat will burn and stick.


Meat ball recipe
2lbs 93%lean chop meat (or veal, pork and beef mixture)
3 eggs
1/2 container of "Plain" bread crumbs
15 heaping table spoons of Locatelli Romano cheese
Parsley
Ground black pepper
context: From document: Mom’s Meat Sauce & Meat Balls — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
